ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candlestick_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the exchange */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the candlestick data in milliseconds */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency for the time interval */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency for the time interval */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency for the time interval */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency for the time interval */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total trading volume during the time interval */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price (VWAP) for the time interval */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades that occurred during the time interval */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval of the candlestick (e.g., 1m, 15m, 1h) */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the candlestick closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candlestick_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Abbreviated symbol for the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cryptocurrency data was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for two-factor authentication */,
  "two_factor_auth_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Available account balance for trading */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last time the account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who executed the trade */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the cryptocurrency being traded */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the exchange */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy or sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trade was executed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last time the trade was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the cryptocurrency for which the alert is set */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the exchange */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, expired) */,
  "last_triggered_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last time the alert was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
